center.name: Mounts Banahaw–San Cristobal Protected Landscape
center.summary: Mounts Banahaw–San Cristobal Protected Landscape是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Luzon island thrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas like Mount Pulag National Park, Mount Polis, Mounts Banahaw–San Cristobal Protected Landscape, Mount Isarog, Mount Mayon, Mount Bulusan
